rooms.name: Ashen Wastes
rooms.description: Barren expanses of ash and stone stretch towards a sickle moon hanging low. Exits: 'north', 'east'.

rooms.name: Bloodstone Keep
rooms.description: Towers shrouded in mist pierce the grey sky like skeletal fingers grasping for the clouds. Exits: 'west'.

rooms.name: Pale Reaches
rooms.description: Frostbitten forests whisper secrets to the wind that whisks them away on dark wings. Exits: 'south', 'north'.

rooms.name: Ghosthollow Ruins
rooms.description: Ancient stones overgrown with vines and moss hide forgotten mysteries. Exits: 'south'.

items.name: Voidstone Dagger
items.description: A blade forged from starlight; whispers of the cosmos echo within its edge.

items.name: Flask of Shadowfire
items.description: Burning embers suspended in darkness, one sip ignites hidden passions.

items.name: Gravewarden's Gauntlets
items.description: Fierce gauntlets etched with the names of every warrior who ever wore them.

items.name: Nightshroud Cloak
items.description: A dark cloak woven from threads spun by the very night itself.

npcs.name: Mira the Seer
npcs.description: A mystic cartographer mapping the unseen paths through forgotten realms.
npcs.dialogue: The paths you seek lie where shadows hide their own faces.

npcs.name: Grask the Devourer
npcs.description: A beast born of darkness, its maw always hungrier for the flesh it consumes.
npcs.dialogue: You will soon be nothing but a meal to satisfy my eternal hunger.

npcs.name: Elara the Weir
npcs.description: A witch bound to the earth, her roots digging deeper into the very ground itself.
npcs.dialogue: The heart you seek beats in the ruins where the ancient ones slumber.

player.name: Hurin
player.description: A brave young warrior with a sharp mind and sharper blade.

quests.name: Goblin Hunt
quests.description: The villager begs you to defeat the vicious goblin terrorizing the Dark Forest. A reward awaits!
